name: N R Agarwal Industries Limited
summary: N R Agarwal Industries Limited develops, manufactures, and sells finished paper products in India. The company offers grey back and white back duplex boards for gravure printing, embossing, and foil stamping; writing and printing papers; and newsprint products. Its products are primarily used in FMCG packaging, textbooks and notebooks, and print media applications. The company exports its products to approximately 36 countries. N R Agarwal Industries Limited was founded in 1975 and is headquartered in Mumbai, India.
